members.title: Dr. P.C. Vijay Kumar, DA, DNB, MNAMS
members.details:
Dr. P. C. Vijayakumar is an esteemed anesthesiologist and critical care physician with over 30 years of experience in anesthesia, critical care, pain management, clinical nutrition, and bronchoscopy. He serves as the Director-Academics and Chief Anesthesiologist at Sooriya Hospital, Chennai.
He is the Past National President of IAPEN INDIA, a leading society for parenteral and enteral nutrition, with expertise in enteral, parenteral, and home TPN, particularly in immunonutrition. A firm advocate of ERAS protocols, he specializes in optimizing perioperative care and enhancing post-surgical recovery.
He is now the founder President of SAPEN( SouthAsian Association of Parental and Enteral Nutrition)
Dr. Vijayakumar is highly skilled in difficult airway management for both adults and pediatrics. He pioneered submental intubation in INDIA and performs percutaneous tracheostomies under bronchoscopic guidance. He is also an accomplished bronchoscopist, conducting both diagnostic and therapeutic procedures.
Recognized for his academic contributions, he is a sought-after speaker and lecturer in the fields of anesthesia, critical care, and clinical nutrition.

members.title: DR. MANSI PATIL
members.details: Dr. Mansi Patil, PhD, is a renowned Nutrition Consultant and expert in hypertension management. Dr. Patil holds key positions in esteemed organizations, including the National Executive Committee of IAPEN INDIA, Chief Program Officer for Hypertension and Nutrition, and Committee Member for Regional Advisory Group for South and Central Asia, International Society of Hypertension. She also serves as Committee Chair for Disparities in CVD, American Society of Preventive Cardiology, and Associate Editor for ESPEN Clinical Nutrition. With a focus on improving healthcare in underserved communities, Dr. Patil is working extensively in the field of hypertension in low-resource settings. She is also a faculty member at Victoria University, Australia, where she shares her expertise and contributes to the development of future healthcare leaders.

members.title:
President
Mr. Y.T. Shivshankar
members.details:
Shivshankar Timmanpyati is a seasoned and highly accomplished clinical nutritionist with over 25 years of experience in the field of nutrition and oncology. He currently serves as the Chief Clinical Nutritionist at Tata Memorial Hospital (TMH), Mumbai, in the Department of Digestive Diseases and Clinical Nutrition, where he oversees the nutritional care of cancer patients, particularly in the domains of critical care, oncology, and gastrointestinal disorders. With a focus on evidence-based practices and patient-centered care, he has contributed significantly to the development of guidelines and clinical protocols in oncology nutrition both in INDIA and internationally.
With over 25 years of experience in clinical nutrition, Shivshankar Timmanpyati is a seasoned professional specializing in oncology nutrition. He currently serves as the Chief Clinical Nutritionist at Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai, focusing on digestive diseases and clinical nutrition. He holds a post-graduate degree in Clinical Dietetics and an MSc in Dietetics and Food Service Management.
He has contributed significantly to research, with many publications and multiple abstract awards, including accolades at national and international conferences. As a distinguished academic, Shivshankar has designed and delivered numerous educational programs. He has presented extensively at global conferences and is a sought-after speaker on topics ranging from critical care nutrition to cancer rehabilitation.
Shivshankar’s work extends beyond hospital walls, with active involvement in community outreach programs, such as nutrition education initiatives for underprivileged children and expecting mothers. His leadership and educational contributions continue to shape the field of clinical nutrition, particularly in oncology.
In addition to his clinical expertise, Shivshankar has been deeply involved in academia, research, and various national and international educational initiatives.

Ms. Lekha Sreedharan
members.details:
MSc, PGCPN, PhD Scholar,
Certified Pediatric Dietitian, ESPEN LLL Teacher
Ms. Lekha is a pioneer in pediatric nutrition with over 27 years of experience in Clinical dietetics. She serves as the Head of the Department of Clinical Dietetics at Apollo Children's & Women’s Hospitals ,Chennai. In addition to providing individualized nutritional interventions for children with complex pediatric disorders, she is actively involved in research and the implementation of protocols to ensure best clinical practices in nutrition within the hospital.
Ms. Lekha has co-edited the Child Nutrition in Health book and contributed articles to various journals, including Nutrition in Disease Update Series and Newsletter. She has co-authored chapters in books such as Diet for Children, Diabetes Chronicles: Real-World Cases and Insights, and the Apollo Clinical Nutrition Handbook and Apollo Pocket books. Ms. Lekha has also delivered lectures and interviews on topics related to nutrition in television and print media

members.details: Associate professor Department of home science, Meerut College, Meerut. Ms. Anshu Mehra is an academician and a clinical nutritionist with over 20 years of experience. She has organized various nutrition awareness events and conferences.

members.title: Dr. Latha Poopandian
members.details:
Anaesthetist | Intensivist | Clinical Nutritionist
A dedicated healthcare professional with 13 years of experience in Anaesthesia and Intensive Care, Dr. Latha Poopandian is a Consultant at Sooriya Hospital, Chennai and a Diplomate of the European Society of Anaesthesiology & Intensive Care. She is a National Executive Committee Member of IAPEN INDIA and has 10 years of expertise in Critical Care Nutrition, specializing in Parenteral, Enteral, SPN, and SEN. Certified in Diabetology, she practices both general and critical care diabetology.
Dr. Latha is skilled in providing anaesthesia for all surgical procedures and is actively involved in Enhanced Recovery After Surgery (ERAS) protocols, training perioperative teams. As an Intensivist, she specializes in emergency medical care, life support, and organ support, with strong communication skills to support patients and their families during critical situations.

members.title: Dr. Rita Patil
members.details:
Dr Patil retired from Maniben Nanavati Women’s College. She was the Vice Principal and Nodal Officer as well as head of Food and Nutrition department. She has a total of 37 years of teaching experience. She has over 35 publications as research papers, chapters in books, articles and a book.
A well-known researcher, she guides Ph.D. students and is involved in research projects. She is reviewer of research papers for various journals. She has been a reviewer of abstracts for international conferences. Dr. Patil has attended and presented papers at several international, national, local conferences/seminars and workshops in INDIA and abroad. She is invited as a resource person at conferences and seminars.
Her consultancy work was at Tara Mobile Creches; Pune; Malini K Sanghavi College; GE; International Food Research Policy. She has her own clinic ‘Nutrition for U’ clinic (since 2006). She is a member of many professional associations (IAPEN, IDA, NSI, AIAARO, AFSTI)
Dr Rita Patil has received several awards for paper presentations and some of the prestigious awards received are -
1. Best Teacher Award of SNDT University; (MAHARSHI KARVE UTKRUSHTA SHIKSHAK PURASKAR in 2023).
2. Won IAPEN Quality Award for Excellence in Nutrition Research in 2023
3. Won the International Best Researcher Award by International Society for Scientific Network Awards (ISSN) in 2022.
4. Best Teacher Award by IIHM, Pune, 2019.

members.title: Ms. Ranu Singh
members.details:
Ranu Singh is a Community Nutritionist & the Founder of NutritionPunch. She currently serves as a National Executive Committee Member of IAPEN INDIA & holds multiple leadership roles within the organization, including Chief Program Officer of the Community Nutrition Core Group & Secretary of the IAPEN INDIA Lucknow Chapter. She is also a Member & Faculty of Nutrition & Diabetes INDIA, a core group of IAPEN INDIA. Beyond her contributions to IAPEN, Ranu leads the Community Nutrition & Public Health Committee of the Poshan Dhara Association & formerly served as the Head of Uttar Pradesh for the Global Nutrition Partnership Program of IAPEN INDIA–ASPEN.
Academically, Ranu is a PhD Scholar with an MSc in Food and Nutrition. She is a Certified Diabetes Educator (IDF) and has completed specialized training in FODMAP with Monash University, Australia. Her qualifications include multiple public health-focused programs from the Public Health Foundation of INDIA (PHFI), including Postgraduate Programs in the Management of Reproductive and Child Health and in Public Health & Nutrition. She also holds a Fellowship in Clinical Nutrition, is a Certified Maternal & Child Nutritionist, and has earned a Master Certificate in Programming for Infant and Young Child Feeding from UNICEF and Cornell University. Additionally, she has completed the MIYCAN course on Maternal, Infant, and Adolescent Nutrition from PHFI, and training in Water, Sanitation, and Hygiene (WASH), Humanitarian WASH Coordination, and Early Childhood Programming in the Field from UNICEF.
Ranu works extensively with females of reproductive age in urban slums and rural areas, raising awareness about dietary needs, healthy lifestyle practices, sanitation, and hygiene. Her goal is to improve health behaviors and outcomes related to the prevention and management of diabetes and other diseases. She is also a co-author of two significant books: “Diabetes Mellitus: Nutrition, Functional Foods & Nutraceuticals”, which offers insights into dietary management and metabolic health, and “Sustainable Nutrition: A Guide for Dietitians to Health and Planetary Well-being”, which integrates nutrition with environmental sustainability.
Her impact extends to academia and public outreach, with over 100 articles published in leading newspapers and magazines on nutrition, public health, and community well-being. She has presented research papers at prestigious international platforms, including the European Society for Clinical Nutrition and Metabolism Congress in Lyon, France, and Milan, Italy.
In recognition of her outstanding contributions to public health nutrition, Ranu has received numerous awards, including the National Quality Award for Excellence in Public Health Nutrition at ICNC 2023 in Chennai and the State Level Quality Award at ICNC 2025 in Varanasi, both presented by IAPEN INDIA.
Her national and international affiliations are extensive. She holds life memberships in IAPEN INDIA, Indian Dietetic Association (IDA), Society for Renal Nutrition and Metabolism (SRNM), Nutrition Society of INDIA (NSI), Indian Public Health Association (IPHA), and the Poshan Dhara Association (PDA). She is an Associate Member of the American Diabetes Association, American Society of Nutrition, and the International Society of Hypertension. She is also a member of the South Asian Association of Parenteral and Enteral Nutrition and a block member of the European Society for Parenteral & Enteral Nutrition.

members.title: Prof. Dr. Shashank R. Joshi
members.details:
Education :
MD, DM, FICP, FACP (USA), FACE (USA), FRCP (London, Glasgow & Edinburgh), Hon D.Sc (Med), Master of the American College of Endocrinology, and Padma Shri Awardee, is an internationally well known endocrinologist renowned for his clinical excellence, academic leadership, and unwavering commitment to patient-centered care.
Current Designation :
He serves as Senior Consultant at Joshi Clinic, Lilavati Hospital, and Sir H. N. Reliance Foundation Hospital, Mumbai.
Institutional Affiliation : A visionary in medical education, he has held key leadership roles including Current President of Asia Pacific Advisory board for American Association of Clinical Endocrinology, Past Chair of the International Diabetes Federation (Southeast Asia), Past President of the Indian Thyroid Society , Past President of Association of Physicians of India (API), Past President of Endocrine Society of India (ESI), Past President and Patron of RSSDI and All India Association of Advancing Research in Obesity, Past Dean of the Indian College of Physicians.
A prolific scholar, Dr. Joshi has authored over 1000 peer-reviewed publications and written more than100 books and is ranked for last 5 consecutive years in the top 0.5 percent of scientists in the Standford list.
He pioneered India-specific protocols for diabetes remission, AI-based lifestyle interventions, and low-cost models for equitable insulin access. As a leading voice in managing thyroid disorders, PCOS, obesity, and hypertension, his work continues to influence national and international guidelines. His dedication to accessible and empathetic care has transformed patient experiences across socio-economic strata.
A true integrator of science and soul, Dr. Joshi draws from India’s ancient wisdom to promote holistic well-being through yoga, spirituality, and Gayatri Mantra meditation.
